case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. EVELING GERARDO BUEZO ULLOA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-18-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
